list.desc: Browse and connect MCP servers to extend your agent's tools. The data below is mock data.
list.notice: Showing local mock data. This banner will be removed once the real backend is connected.

detail.title: MCP Details
detail.tokenHint: Replace the <把这里换成你的 Token> placeholder in the config with your own token before use.

probeError.init_failed: Connection config is incomplete; cannot fetch the tool list.
probeError.no_tools_capability: This MCP does not expose a tool list.
